response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web and mobile development, with minimal evidence of hardware-software co-design or low-level system performance tuning for AI workloads, despite some exposure to DLang and embedded systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in developer tooling
Proven ability to build and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator architecture
Lacks visible expertise in deep-learning workload analysis or GPU optimization
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware/performance experience
